'''鈭歱-ng-ch-th''' ('''kapangchethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:altruize|altruize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-ng-ch-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:altruize|altruize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-ng-ch-th
|-
! Lemma
| kapangchethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipangchethoko|thipangchethoko]] || [[word:jipangchethoko|jipangchethoko]] || [[word:shipangchethoko|shipangchethoko]] || [[word:kipangchethoko|kipangchethoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopangchethoko|thopangchethoko]] || [[word:jopangchethoko|jopangchethoko]] || [[word:shopangchethoko|shopangchethoko]] || [[word:kopangchethoko|kopangchethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pangchethoko|th忙pangchethoko]] || [[word:j忙pangchethoko|j忙pangchethoko]] || [[word:sh忙pangchethoko|sh忙pangchethoko]] || [[word:k忙pangchethoko|k忙pangchethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapangchethoko|thathapangchethoko]] || [[word:jajapangchethoko|jajapangchethoko]] || [[word:shashapangchethoko|shashapangchethoko]] || [[word:kakapangchethoko|kakapangchethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapangchethoko|thapangchethoko]] || [[word:japangchethoko|japangchethoko]] || [[word:shapangchethoko|shapangchethoko]] || [[word:kapangchethoko|kapangchethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapangchethoko|thapangchethoko]] || [[word:japangchethoko|japangchethoko]] || [[word:shapangchethoko|shapangchethoko]] || [[word:kapangchethoko|kapangchethoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
